name: icloud-mcp
description: Personal iCloud Calendar, Mail, and Contacts integration for MCP clients.
long_description:
Connects an MCP client to your iCloud Calendar (CalDAV), iCloud Mail (IMAP + SMTP), and iCloud Contacts (CardDAV). Read and modify events, search and respond to meeting invites, find free time, read, search, send, and organize mail, and search contacts. Includes workflow tools that combine calendar and mail in one call (today's brief; meeting prep with bidirectional email correspondence).

All communication is between the running server and iCloud directly. Credentials should be stored in local environment variables or deployment secrets.

Requires an app-specific password from appleid.apple.com (Sign-In and Security → App-Specific Passwords). The same password works for Calendar, Mail, SMTP, and Contacts.

icloud_username.title: iCloud Email
icloud_username.description: Your full Apple ID email address (e.g. you@icloud.com).

icloud_app_password.title: App-Specific Password
icloud_app_password.description: Generate at appleid.apple.com → Sign-In and Security → App-Specific Passwords. Format: xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx. Stored in your OS keychain.

icloud_user_aliases.title: Email Aliases (optional)
icloud_user_aliases.description: Comma-separated additional emails you receive mail/invites under (e.g. you@me.com,you@mac.com). Without this, responding to invites addressed to your aliases will fail.

icloud_user_timezone.title: Timezone (optional)
icloud_user_timezone.description: IANA timezone name like America/Los_Angeles or Europe/London. Used by today_brief and other workflow tools so 'today' matches your local time. Defaults to UTC.

icloud_mcp_read_only.title: Read-only mode
icloud_mcp_read_only.description: Disable all destructive tools (sends, deletes, edits). Recommended while you're getting comfortable.

tools.name: list_calendars
tools.description: List all iCloud calendars on the connected account.

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List calendar events within a time window.

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Fetch a single event by UID.

tools.name: search_events
tools.description: Substring search across event title, description, and location.

tools.name: find_free_slots
tools.description: Find free time slots of at least N minutes in a window.

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create a new (non-recurring) calendar event.

tools.name: update_event
tools.description: Modify an existing event; supports per-occurrence updates for recurring events.

tools.name: delete_event
tools.description: Delete an event; supports per-occurrence cancellation via EXDATE.

tools.name: respond_to_invite
tools.description: Accept, decline, or tentatively accept a meeting invite.

tools.name: list_mailboxes
tools.description: List all IMAP folders on the connected iCloud Mail account.

tools.name: list_messages
tools.description: List recent message headers from a folder, newest first.

tools.name: get_message
tools.description: Fetch a single message with body and attachment metadata.

tools.name: search_mail
tools.description: Server-side IMAP search over a mailbox by sender, subject, content, or date.

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Reconstruct the conversation containing a given message; supports cross-mailbox search.

tools.name: get_attachment
tools.description: Fetch a single attachment's bytes by index.

tools.name: send_mail
tools.description: Send a new email via SMTP and save a copy to the Sent folder.

tools.name: mark_read
tools.description: Mark messages as read.

tools.name: mark_unread
tools.description: Mark messages as unread.

tools.name: flag_messages
tools.description: Add a star/flag to messages.

tools.name: unflag_messages
tools.description: Remove the star/flag from messages.

tools.name: move_message
tools.description: Move a single message between folders.

tools.name: delete_message
tools.description: Delete a message; soft-delete to Trash by default.

tools.name: list_contact_addressbooks
tools.description: List all iCloud Contacts CardDAV address books.

tools.name: list_contacts
tools.description: List contacts from iCloud Contacts.

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search contacts by name, organization, email, or phone.

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Fetch one contact by CardDAV resource URL.

tools.name: today_brief
tools.description: Single-call summary of today's calendar + recent unread mail.

tools.name: prep_for_meeting
tools.description: Bundle event details + bidirectional email correspondence with attendees.
